title: BlessStar Config JSON v1
description: Canonical configuration document consumed by the BlessStar main chain (parse → IR → ir_gate). Runtime allowed instruction types are defined by kernel builtin + merge_activation; this schema does not enumerate them.

kernel_version.description: Must align with KernelBuiltinRequirements.kernel_version at attach time.

manual_requirements.description: Optional extension types; merged with builtin (builtin wins on duplicate type). Omit or use [].

instructions.description: IR payload; each item maps to IRInstruction. May be empty [].

type.description: IRInstruction.type; must be allowed by merge_activation at runtime.

metadata.description: Flat string map → IRMetadata chain (MVP: values are strings only).
